Description: The name of this team. This field is shown in referrals and reports.
A short description of the team.
Link to this team's shared drive (e.g. Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, SharePoint Library).
Link to the team's web page.
A link to this team's Slack workspace.
The Microsoft Teams account for this team.
A link to this team's GitHub or GitLab repo. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://github.com/DepressionCenter) or just the @ name (e.g. @DepressionCenter).
A link to this team's calendar.
The MCommunity group email address, if applicable (e.g. efdc-mtc@umich.edu).
The primary lead for this team or core (required). Used for some email notifications and automations.
The faculty lead (or co-leads) for this team, if applicable.
List of team members (must be in People list as well). This field is kept separate from the Team Member Accounts field because not all team members may have a Michigan Medicine (U-M level-2) login.
MS Teams accounts of the members of this team, if available. This field is kept separate from the Team Members field because not all team members may have a Michigan Medicine (U-M level-2) login.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Indicates whether this record is active (enabled). Inactive records are hidden by default, and are not used in any automations.
The email address of the primary lead for this team or core. Used for automations.

Contains the M365-linked email addresses (Michigan Medicine emails) of those team members who have a level-2 account. This can be used in other lists to create filters based on the person viewing the list.
